remarks: One of the largest and most desirable floor plans at The Metropolitan, this impressive 1,530 sq ft residence offers exceptional space, flexibility, and value. Common charges include delivery of heat and central air, hot water, cooking gas, concierge service, fitness center, and building amenities. The building has recently completed significant improvements, all fully paid with no current assessments.  This sophisticated 2-bedroom plus oversized den/home office features an expansive layout ideal for everyday living and entertaining, including a sun-filled living room, spacious dining area, and large bonus room perfect for a home office, guest space, or media room. Soaring 10'10" ceilings and dramatic walls of windows create an open, airy feel while showcasing beautiful city views and spectacular sunsets.  The chef's kitchen features granite countertops and premium appliances including a Sub-Zero refrigerator, Wolf gas range, and Bosch dishwasher. The spacious primary suite offers a walk-in closet and spa-inspired bath with double sinks, while a generously sized second bedroom with walk-in closet and full bath provide comfort and privacy.  Two deeded side-by-side garage parking spaces add tremendous value and convenience. Residents enjoy concierge service, fitness center, and residents' lounge. Ideally located in Downtown Stamford, just moments from Metro-North for an easy NYC commute and convenient access to restaurants, shopping, entertainment, Parks,and major highways
